backend/main.mo: Main actor module defining all data types (vehicles, promotions, testimonials, blog posts, media assets, visitor tracking, etc.) and including mixins for storage, authorization, and access control with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that duplicates all type definitions from main.mo and exports a run function for data migration during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend React components, pages, hooks, and layouts describing their functionality and data flow.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file with no content.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (home, vehicles, promos, blog, contact, credit simulation) and protected admin routes wrapped in AuthGuard, plus QueryClient and ThemeProvider setup.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating and editing admin users with name and email fields, automatic principal ID assignment from logged-in user for new users, and role display.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Displays a table of admin users with edit and delete actions. Prevents deletion of the last admin and shows loading skeletons while fetching data.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: Modal dialog for selecting banner images from media assets with radio button selection. Filters and displays only image-type assets in a grid layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: Form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields. Validates delegation token expiration before submission and handles both create and update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Table view of blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions and displays post creation dates.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Grid display of media assets (images and PDFs) with copy ID and delete functionality. Creates blob URLs from canister data and validates delegation identity before delete operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: Drag-and-drop file upload component supporting images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) and PDFs with size limits. Validates delegation identity and shows upload progress before submitting to backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses custom hooks for create/update mutations and manages form state with validation.
Table component displaying all vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes loading states, empty state, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and manages timestamp for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete actions. Includes loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts, with loading and empty states. Converts bigint page view data to chart format and truncates long URLs for display.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts. Converts bigint timestamp data to formatted dates and handles loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if authentication is invalid or expired.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a list of 5 recent articles with icons, navigating to individual blog posts by slug when clicked.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons. Includes a dropdown menu with site navigation links that closes on outside click.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Provides a button-based selector for commercial vehicle variants, managing selection state and notifying parent component of changes.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a full-width CTA banner with overlay text and WhatsApp button, using either a custom banner image from website settings or a fallback static asset.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with company info, contact details, social media links, and real-time visitor statistics that auto-refresh every 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero section that displays different titles, icons, backgrounds, and subtexts based on the current pathname, with special styling for Mobil Niaga pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Carousel component displaying up to 8 family vehicle catalogs using VehicleCard components, with loading state handling.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles ('Mobil Niaga') fetched from the vehicle catalog API, showing loading state and using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main hero banner with a customizable image from website settings or a fallback static asset, overlaying text about Mitsubishi Motors.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu that links to main site sections (home, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, contact).
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for vehicle products, tracking interaction counts and integrating with native share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of the first 4 featured vehicles from the catalog as 'Produk Unggulan' (Featured Products) using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the family vehicles page with a search query parameter when submitted.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three dealership advantages: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an official dealer with commitment to service and flexible financing.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component for choosing vehicle variants and colors, notifying parent component of selection changes via callback.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, starting price, and detail link with slug-based URL generation.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and UI text constants for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook to fetch admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, leads, visitors) with placeholder implementation returning zero values.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing admin users (fetch all, get by principal, create, update, delete) with authentication and network error handling, toast notifications, and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (fetch all, get by ID, create, update, delete) with error handling and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed and not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations; all backend methods are missing and return empty arrays or stubs with console warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Exports a mutation hook for submitting contact form data; backend method is not implemented and logs a warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions; backend method is missing and returns an empty array.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Exports a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data; backend method is not implemented and logs a warning.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations; backend method is missing and returns an empty array.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for media asset operations (fetch all, get by ID, upload, delete) with error handling, progress tracking, toast notifications, and graceful fallbacks for public pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Defines React Query hooks for product like/share counts and actions; all backend methods are missing and return stubs with console warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions with authentication and network error handling; currently stubbed with empty arrays and dummy IDs until backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Exports hooks for fetching vehicle catalogs and individual vehicle catalog data; currently returns empty arrays/null as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a single hook to fetch website settings using React Query; currently returns null as backend is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials with authentication and network error handling; currently stubbed with empty arrays and dummy IDs until backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles with authentication and network error handling; currently stubbed with empty arrays and dummy IDs until backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Exports hooks for fetching visitor statistics from the backend; getVisitorStats is implemented while visitor trend and page views hooks are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now logs a deprecation notice; actual tracking is handled by PublicLayout component.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings with authentication and network error handling; includes detailed logging for image ID types during updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including sidebar, charts, and UI component tokens using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile menu, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, media, leads, credit simulations, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar. Implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs, device detection, and browser fingerprinting while skipping bots and admin routes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with add/edit dialog and list view, invalidating React Query cache on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulation submissions from visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays contact form submissions in a sortable table showing name, email, message, and timestamp with loading states.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid, invalidating React Query cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh (15s), showing metrics like total/daily/weekly visitors, online users, and charts for trends and top pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images with media asset picker integration.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, automatic redirect on successful login, and session cleanup before new login attempts.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: main banner, vehicle highlights, CTA banner, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with form for inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, message) and contact information display.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public vehicle detail page showing vehicle info, variant/color selector, pricing, product interactions, and tabbed specs/features sections.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public page displaying grid of passenger vehicles (up to 8) using VehicleCard components from catalog data.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Displays a grid of commercial vehicles filtered by category slug from URL params, showing up to 8 published vehicles with loading state.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Shows detailed vehicle information with variant selector, price display, product interactions, and tabbed specifications/features sections.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page displaying three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page indicating promo section is under development.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor, then submits to backend.
Placeholder page indicating testimonial section is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all domain entities (Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, etc.) matching backend types.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions to convert MediaAsset Uint8Array blob data from canister storage into browser-displayable blob URLs and check MIME types.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installment using 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides validation functions for form inputs (email, phone, URL, numeric, length) and delegation identity authentication, returning error messages in Indonesian or null if valid.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Utility functions for visitor tracking including session ID generation/retrieval, device/browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking admin management system architecture with role-based access control, pending feature requests for refactoring createAdminUser function to use msg.caller and implement super_admin logic.
